programs.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighbourhood
programs.desc: Daniel and Jodi make a pretend city out of all of the blankets in the Platypus house. When it's nap time for Teddy and Leo, Jodi finds Leo's missing blankie for him to snuggle - that's what he needs to help him rest.

programs.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programs.desc: Morgan takes Amy to the Doctor Bananas new clinic at Rat's shop after she knocks her head on a tree. The Doctor Bananas, assisted by Nurse Rat, are very busy and discover at the Doctor Bananas clinic, laughter is the best medicine.

programs.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programs.desc: Lulu wishes she was a princess so the Bananas play along with her, introducing her as the Princess Lulu. Amy and Morgan pretend to be a queen and an emperor and Rat decides to be President. The Bananas are happy to be just who they are.

programs.title: Fizzy And Suds
programs.desc: Fizzy and Suds discover some of the clever things that happen on railways! Two passenger trains become one in a faraway railway station, and then they see how freight trains move giant boxes all around the country!

programs.title: Peppa Pig
programs.desc: Peppa tries to learn how to whistle, when she realises everyone but her can do it.
